host.label: Bind host
host.description: Address the server listens on. Use 0.0.0.0 inside Docker/Podman containers so port mappings work.

port.label: Port
port.description: Port for the Vitest UI server. Project-scoped so the whole team hits the same URL.

filter.label: Test filter
filter.description: File path or pattern to scope which tests run. Empty runs all tests.

coverage.label: Coverage
coverage.description: Run with @vitest/coverage-v8. Adds a coverage tab to the UI.
